Hey There

Ever wonder what's actually happening inside your remote, your phone, or the device you're reading this on right now?

Printed Circuit Boards (PCBs) are the hidden "brains" of the modern world. While manufacturing them is a high-level engineering feat, the journey starts with the basics: simple LEDs, resistors, and breadboards.

We're inviting you to pull back the curtain and learn how to build tech from the ground up!

Join Our 2-Day Hands-On Workshop

Learn directly from Mr. Toms Thomas, a B.I.T.S. Pilani alumnus, former Indian Naval Officer, and seasoned electronics expert. This isn't just a lecture — it's a deep dive into creating.

Day 1

The Fundamentals

Get comfortable with the building blocks. We’ll cover resistors, capacitors, and diodes, and show you how to bring a breadboard circuit to life.

 

Day 2

Arduino & Beyond

Step into the world of microcontrollers. Learn to program an Arduino and make your hardware respond to your commands.

🎁 The best part? You get to take the components home to keep experimenting!

Workshop Details

📍 Venue

Malayala Manorama
Head Office, Kottayam

📅 Dates

May 25th & 26th, 2025

💰 Price

₹3,500 only

Can't Be There in Person?

No problem! We've designed a short online course that covers the essentials for just ₹499/-. Perfect for starting your journey from the comfort of your home.

Explore Online Course →

Meet Your Instructor

Mr. Toms Thomas

B.I.T.S. Pilani · Indian Naval Officer · Electronics Expert

Mr. Toms Thomas brings over a decade of expertise to the table. From coaching civil service aspirants to leading workshops like Circuit Magic, he specializes in making complex technology accessible, fun, and engaging. When he isn't teaching Generative AI or coding, you'll likely find him hiking or capturing the world through nature photography.

Ready to start building? Check out our courses and sign up here!
